title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS libraries to pull and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, CodeLlama, etc. locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client (PyPI: ollama) offering sync/async APIs, streaming, chat & embed endpoints.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client (npm: ollama) for Node & browsers with fetch-based streaming.

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you swap Ollama models into any chain or agent with two lines of code.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI that talks to your local Ollama instance; no data leaves your machine.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Android compatibility and fluent builder APIs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Lightweight Ruby gem exposing Ollama’s REST endpoints as idiomatic Ruby objects.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with fuzzy-find model picker and chat REPL.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like VS-Code extension using local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for running Ollama on Raspberry Pi, Docker-compose stacks, GPU passthrough, etc.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-affinity and autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official multi-arch Docker images (CPU, CUDA, ROCm) with one-command run examples.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake packaging Ollama binary and systemd module for declarative macOS/Linux installs.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with any local Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that streams Ollama responses into threads with @bot mentions or slash commands.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Minimal Streamlit chat UI that connects to Ollama via the official Python client; runs locally or in Docker.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container for CI-based LLM testing or code-gen pipelines.

title: ollama-go
summary: Unofficial Go client library (go get github.com/jmorganca/ollama-go) with context-aware chat helpers.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Template repo showing how to combine Ollama + Chroma + LangChain for a fully local RAG chatbot.
